dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION The recommended dosage of cilostazol is 100 mg twice daily taken at least half an hour before or two hours after breakfast and dinner ( 2.1 ) Reduce the dose to 50 mg twice daily when coadministered with CYP3A4 inhibitors such as ketoconazole, itraconazole, erythromycin, and diltiazem, or CYP2C19 inhibitors such as ticlopidine, fluconazole, and omeprazole ( 2.2 ) 2.1 Recommended dosage The recommended dosage of cilostazol is 100 mg twice daily taken at least half an h
